prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含理科）最低位次约7015→11651→8769→10856→12790，整体呈波动后移趋势，2025年基准约12790名，近两年累计后移约1934名；2021–2025年本省理科/物理类计划分别为56→58→56→54→58人；2026年计划57人，较2025年微缩1人（-1.7%），缩招幅度极小，对竞争格局影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流高校；软科主榜2026年约第66名，近年排名稳定在65–72之间，学校综合实力保持稳健；2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，仅涉及预约入校政策回应 ，无重大负面事件；抖音热度排名第92位（一般），短视频曝光量偏低，未出现明显报考关注升温信号；近年无投档断档记录；应用经济学A+、工商管理A、统 计学A-，财经类学科实力突出，对相关专业报考有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 金融/财经/经济类专业热度2024年呈分化观望，较2023年小幅升温，整体平稳；本省2026年物理类考生167419人，较2025年173347人减少约3.4%，竞争压力略有缓解。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动后移趋势、2026年计划微幅缩招、本省物理类考生小幅减少以及声誉中性等因素，在2025年基准12790名基础上预计位次略降（竞争略加剧）；预测最低位次 约12628名，区间12128–13128名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 7015 → 11651 → 8769 → 10856 → 12790, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. The 2025 baseline is about 12790, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1934 in the last two years. From 2021 to 2025, the provincial science/physics enrollment plans were 56 → 58 → 56 → 54 → 58 respectively. The 2026 plan is 57, a slight decrease of 1 (-1.7%) from 2025, which has minimal impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 66th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with stable rankings between 65-72 in recent years, maintaining solid comprehensive strength. The 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, only involving responses to campus visit policies, with no major negative events. Douyin popularity ranks 92nd (average), with low short video exposure and no obvious signs of increased application attention. No record of enrollment gaps in recent years. Applied Economics A+, Business Administration A, Statistics A-, with outstanding strength in finance and economics disciplines, providing sustained appeal for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Finance/Economics/Economy major popularity showed differentiation and wait-and-see in 2024, with a slight warming compared to 2023, overall stable. The provincial number of Physics Category candidates in 2026 is 167,419, a decrease of about 3.4% from 173,347 in 2025, slightly easing competition pressure.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating backward trend of historical rankings, the slight reduction in 2026 enrollment plan, the small decrease in provincial Physics Category candidates, and neutral reputation, based on the 2025 baseline of 12790, the ranking is expected to slightly decrease (competition slightly intensifies). Predicted minimum ranking approximately 12628, with a range of 12128-13128.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 12100), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 Applied Economics A+ related majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2021–2025 minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category approximately 1112→1122→2814→1450→1835, with a spike in 2023, recovering to 1450–1835 range in 2024–2025, baseline for 2025 about 1835; provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plans for 2021–2025 were 32→30→32→33→31 respectively; 2026 plan is 24, a decrease of 7 (-22.6%) from 2025, a significant reduction, theoretically intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class university; Soft Science main ranking about 66th in 2026, stable in recent years; 2026 reputation evaluation neutral/mixed, no major negative events; Douyin popularity ranking 92nd (average), no significant surge in application interest; Applied Economics A+, Business Administration A, Statistics A-, strong finance and economics disciplines, consistently attractive to liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Finance/economics/economy major popularity diverging with observation, accounting/finance/auditing recommended in 2024, liberal arts-related majors stable; provincial history category candidates in 2026 63,113, a significant decrease of about 25.6% from 2025's 84,879, markedly easing competition pressure.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the offsetting effects of the 2025 baseline of 1835, the significant enrollment reduction in 2026 (-22.6%), and the substantial decrease in provincial history category candidates (-25.6%), the candidate reduction slightly outweighs the enrollment reduction, competition slightly weakened; predicted minimum ranking approximately 1606, range 1106–2106.
